narrative:
Mad River Township has 8,033 registered voters, with 53.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.2 percentage points.
